texto: We obey people we don't trust, to buy things we don't need, to impress people we don't like, using money we don't have, for gratifications that don't last, killing animals we don't hate, for pleasures that don't satisfy, dreaming of a life we don't deserve, and praying for an afterlife that doesn't exist, we are a stupid species
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Philip Wollen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “We obey people we don't trust, to buy things we don't need, to impress people we don't like, usin…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humanity, species pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de species e stupidity.
